---
title: \textbf{Examining The Effect of Padding on Facial Recognition Using Convolution Neural Networks}
output:
  pdf_document:
    number_sections: TRUE
    keep_tex: true
    latex_engine: pdflatex # Ensure you're using a compatible LaTeX engine
geometry: "left = 2.5cm, right = 2cm, top = 2cm, bottom = 2cm"
fontsize: 12pt
header-includes:
  - \usepackage{float}
  - \usepackage{sectsty}
  - \usepackage{paralist}
  - \usepackage{setspace}
  - \setstretch{2.0}
  - \usepackage{fancyhdr}
  - \usepackage{lastpage}
  - \usepackage{dcolumn}
  - \usepackage{natbib}\bibliographystyle{agsm}
  - \usepackage[nottoc, numbib]{tocbibind}
bibliography: bibliography.bib
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


\allsectionsfont{\centering}
\subsectionfont{\raggedright}
\subsubsectionfont{\raggedright}

\pagenumbering{gobble}

\begin{centering}

```{r uni_logo, echo=F, out.width="80%"}
knitr::include_graphics("img/jkuatlogo.png")
```

Wycliffe Atswenje Sikolia \vspace{1cm}


A Research Proposal Submitted in Partial Fulfillment of The Requirements for The Award of a Post Graduate Diploma in Applied Statistics of Jomo Kenyatta University of Agriculture and Technology.\vspace{1cm}


2024 

\end{centering}

\newpage

\pagenumbering{gobble}

\begin{centering}

{\bf DECLARATION}

\end{centering}

\spacing{1.5}

This research proposal is my own work and has not been presented elsewhere for a degree award.\vspace{0.3cm}

Signature.........................................              Date..............................................\vspace{0.3cm}

Wycliffe Atswenje Sikolia \vspace{0.3cm}

SCB384-3284/2013 \vspace{1cm}

Declaration by supervisors \vspace{0.3cm}

This research proposal has been submitted for examination with our approval as university supervisors.\vspace{0.3cm}

Signature ........................................ Date .......................... \vspace{0.3cm}

Dr. Anthony Kibira Wanjoya \vspace{0.3cm}

Department of Statistics and Actuarial Sciences \vspace{0.3cm}

Jomo Kenyatta University of Agriculture and Technology \vspace{1cm}


Signature ........................................        Date ..........................\vspace{0.3cm}

Dr. Jane Aduda \vspace{0.3cm}

Department of Statistics and Actuarial Sciences\vspace{0.3cm}

Jomo Kenyatta University of Agriculture and Technology\vspace{0.3cm}

\newpage

\pagenumbering{gobble}

\begin{centering}

{\bf DEDICATION}

\end{centering}

To my Family and Friends.

\newpage

\pagenumbering{gobble}

\begin{centering}

{\bf ACKNOWLEDGEMENT}

\end{centering}
Special regards to my supervisors Dr. Anthony Kibira Wanjoya and Dr. Jane Aduda for their guidance and relentless criticism on this work. Their continuous support, insightful comments, and demand for excellence have played a crucial role in this work. I am particularly grateful to my father whose moral support has been instrumental in my studies. My friends and family have also helped during the course of my studies by reminding me of the need to focus and complete my studies, which is the reason I got this far. Their words of positive affirmation gave me a shoulder to lean on when the going got difficult. I would also like to thank members of the department of statistics and actuarial sciences from the Jomo Kenyatta University of Agriculture and Technology for their support in my studies. Most importantly I would like to thank the almighty God for granting me the knowledge to carry out this study
